label: Employment rates of young persons not in education and training by educational attainment level and years since completion of highest level of education

label.ED0-4: Less than primary, primary, secondary and post-secondary non-tertiary education (levels 0-4)
label.ED0-2: Less than primary, primary and lower secondary education (levels 0-2)
label.ED3-8: Upper secondary, post-secondary non-tertiary and tertiary education (levels 3-8)
label.ED3_4: Upper secondary and post-secondary non-tertiary education (levels 3 and 4)
label.ED34_44: Upper secondary and post-secondary non-tertiary education - general (levels 34 and 44)
label.ED35_45: Upper secondary and post-secondary non-tertiary education - vocational (levels 35 and 45)

label.bu: break in time series, low reliability
label.bd: break in time series, definition differs (see metadata)
